summary: Iteration 116 - Frontend testing of TrendScout marketing site homepage improvements. All homepage sections render correctly with proper content, links, and responsiveness. 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with headline 'Stop guessing. Find products that actually sell in the UK.'
Hero primary CTA button shows A/B test variant ('Try TrendScout Free'/'Find Winning Products'/'Start Free') and links to /signup
Hero secondary CTA 'See How It Works' links to /how-it-works
Trust bar shows all 4 items: 'Built for UK ecommerce sellers', '7-signal scoring model', 'Multi-channel product intelligence', 'Shopify, TikTok Shop & Amazon UK'
Who it's for section renders with 4 audience cards: Shopify sellers, Amazon UK sellers, TikTok Shop UK sellers, UK ecommerce founders
UK differentiation section renders with 'Not every viral product works in the UK' heading and US vs UK comparison
How it works section shows 3 steps: Discover products, Analyse UK viability, Launch with confidence
Feature highlights section shows 4 cards: Trend detection, Competition analysis, Profit estimation, AI launch insights
Pricing preview section renders with 3 plan cards (Starter £19, Growth £39, Pro £79)
Growth plan highlighted as 'Best for serious sellers'
Final CTA section renders with 'Validate your next product' heading
Final CTA primary button links to /signup
Final CTA secondary button 'View Sample Analysis' links to /sample-product-analysis
Navigation links work: Features, Product, Solutions, How It Works, Pricing
Features link navigates to /features
How It Works link navigates to /how-it-works
Pricing link navigates to /pricing
Pricing page renders with headline 'Simple pricing. Built for UK sellers.'
Pricing page shows 3 cards with correct taglines: Starter (Start validating product ideas), Growth (Best for serious sellers), Pro (For agencies and power users)
Pricing page CTAs: Starter 'Try free for 7 days', Growth/Pro 'Start free trial'
Pricing page feature comparison table renders
Pricing page FAQ section renders
Pricing page final CTA 'Start Free' renders
Mobile responsiveness: Hero section visible
Mobile responsiveness: Mobile menu toggle visible and functional
Mobile responsiveness: Trust bar visible
Mobile responsiveness: Audience section visible
Mobile responsiveness: Pricing preview visible
Mobile responsiveness: Final CTA visible
Live Trending Products section loads 3 product cards from /api/public/trending-products
Quick Viability Search section renders
View all products button navigates to /trending-products
critical_code_review_comments: Homepage sections are well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
A/B testing implemented for hero CTA and final CTA buttons using useABTest hook
Live trending products correctly fetches from /api/public/trending-products endpoint
Mobile menu properly toggles and shows all navigation items
Pricing page correctly displays all 3 plans with proper taglines and CTAs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 116 verified homepage redesign for marketing site. All sections render correctly: Hero (with A/B tested CTAs), Trust bar (4 items), Who it's for (4 audience cards), UK Differentiation (US vs UK comparison), How it works (3 steps), Feature highlights (4 cards), Quick Viability Search, Live Trending Products (3 cards from API), Pricing Preview (3 plans with Growth highlighted), Final CTA. Navigation works for all main items. Mobile responsiveness verified. Pricing page verified with correct taglines and CTAs.
console_warnings: 403 error on some resource (non-critical, likely analytics or external resource)
homepage_sections_verified: Hero section with A/B tested CTAs
